stories.title: Blocked schema names failing item + field
stories.description: As an operator, when `update` blocks a schema, I can see which item and which field caused the validation failure.

stories.title: Blocked gets the same diagnostic conflicts gives
stories.description: As an operator, I get the same diagnostic for `blocked` that `conflicts` already gives, instead of `blocked` being opaque.

stories.title: No reverse-engineering failure from schema diff
stories.description: As an operator, I don't have to reverse-engineer the failure from the schema diff.

stories.title: Diagnostic to unblock, not stopping at no safe migration
stories.description: As an operator, the tool gives me the diagnostic needed to unblock, instead of stopping at "no safe migration."

stories.title: Validate block items directly against target catalog schema
stories.description: As an operator, I can validate the block items directly against the target catalog schema and see what fails — which `update` doesn't expose and `context-validate` doesn't do.

stories.title: Fix items or local schema then re-run update
stories.description: As an operator, once I see why the block items don't validate, I can fix either the items or the local schema and re-run `update`.

stories.title: check-status reports schemas behind catalog + version gap
stories.description: As an operator, I want check-status to report which installed schemas are behind the catalog, and by what version gap.

stories.title: dryRun runs real forward-migration + re-validation
stories.description: As an operator, I want update --dryRun to prospectively run the actual forward-migration + re-validation against the block items, so it never predicts resynced when the live run will hit blocked.

stories.title: Per-blocked-schema: item id, field, constraint
stories.description: As an operator, I want update to report, per blocked schema, which item id failed, on which field, against which constraint — so I can act without diffing schemas and hand-auditing the block.

stories.title: Drop catalog schema as sidecar for local diff
stories.description: As an operator, I want update to drop the catalog schema as a sidecar file (or provide a command to fetch it), so I can diff locally without hunting through node_modules.

stories.title: resolve-conflict-style command advances merge base
stories.description: As an operator, I want a resolve-conflict-style command for blocked schemas — I fix the items or widen the local schema, run it, and the merge base advances so the schema stops re-blocking.

stories.title: Blocked resolution loop mirrors conflicts end-to-end
stories.description: As an operator, I want the resolution loop for blocked to mirror conflicts/resolve-conflict end-to-end: diagnose → fix → retry, not a dead end.

stories.title: In-file git-style failure markers at offending items/fields
stories.description: As an operator, when update blocks a schema, I expect failure markers written INTO the block file at the offending items and fields — the way git merge writes conflict markers into source files — so I open the block and see the problem inline, not only in a CLI report.

stories.title: resolve-blocked / update --continue re-validates + advances
stories.description: As an operator, when I've fixed the in-file markers for a blocked schema, I expect a single command — resolve-blocked or update --continue — that re-validates the block against the target schema, advances the merge base, and writes the new schema file. The git model: fix conflicts → git add → git merge --continue.
